package.name: phm_ood
package.description: Rolling-spread OOD detector lifecycle node for the Policy Health Monitor. Subscribes to PolicyEmbedding on a configurable topic, maintains a rolling window, computes rolling_spread via phm_core.calibration, compares against a calibrated threshold (low spread = OOD), applies phm_core.Hysteresis, and publishes a DetectorVerdict on /phm/verdicts with source='phm_ood'.
